rationale: Title X communicates the study's key finding (transient, reversible cognitive decline) directly and engagingly, whereas Title Y omits any finding and contains a grammatical error ('Control' instead of 'Controlled'), making it both uninformative and less polished.
loser_weakness: Title Y discloses no finding and uses a generic 'impact of X on Y' frame with a grammatical error, offering readers no reason to engage beyond the study design.
